name: Egg Drop Soup- Microwave
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole dish, stir together the broth, cornstarch, vinegar, and soy sauce until smooth.
2. Stir in the ham, snow peas, and green onions.
3. Cover with a lid and microwave on high for 10 minutes or until boiling, stirring twice during cooking.
4. With a fork, gently stir the broth in a swirling motion.
5. Slowly pour the eggs into the swirling broth; stir just until they are set in long strands.
